channel.title: Parallel-Agents on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Parallel-Agents on DevOpsTales

item.title: Kilo Code: Parallel Agents and the Agent Manager
item.description: Welcome to the final installment of our Kilo Code Deep Dive series. Throughout this journey, we’ve explored installation, Qwen integration, Modes, Indexing, Spec-Driven Development, Steering, MCP, and Skills.
